columns.name: Drug Name
columns.description: Extract the drug name in generic form used in the antibody-drug conjugate (e.g., 'trastuzumab').

columns.name: Target Antigen
columns.description: Extract the specific target antigen that the antibody is designed to bind to (e.g., 'HER2').

columns.name: Source URL
columns.description: Extract the URL of the source where the information was obtained; if not available, use 'N/A' (e.g., 'https://example.com').
